title: Suggest 2-of-2 Co-Resolve: Cross-Author Confirmation
desc: When wkappbot suggest resolve is called by a different channel than the suggest author, requires 2-of-2 confirmation before marking resolved. Prevents maintainer fake bulk-resolves.
steps: resolver_channel = AbbreviateCwd(CWD) compared case-insensitively to suggest.from
Cross-author first resolve: writes half_resolved_by/note/at to suggest entry, posts Slack thread asking author to confirm
Cross-author second resolve (other party): completes 2/2, moves to history with both notes
Same-author or bug-auto: resolves immediately as before
--force reason: bypasses gate, posts override notice to Slack thread
--confirm flag: marks this call as the confirming (2nd) party

requirements.cmd: wkappbot suggest resolve <cross-author-ts> note --skill X --evidence Y
requirements.expect: [RESOLVE:HALF] 1/2 by DG-WKAppBot -- waiting for DG-WkAutoQuant to confirm

requirements.cmd: wkappbot suggest resolve <ts> note --confirm --skill X --evidence Y
wkappbot suggest resolve <same-author-ts> note --skill X --evidence Y
wkappbot suggest resolve ts note --skill X --evidence Y
wkappbot suggest resolve ts note --confirm --skill X --evidence Y
wkappbot suggest resolve ts note --force reason --skill X

primary_cmd: wkappbot suggest resolve ts note --skill X --evidence Y
author: claude
